title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mphasis Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Mphasis Digital Technologies - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Mphasis Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Ranchi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mphasis Digital Technologies:
Mphasis Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mphasis Digital Technologies!
